text.en: OpenAI introduced CLIP as a contrastive model trained on image-text pairs collected at web scale. It connected vision and language through a shared embedding space and enabled strong zero-shot image classification.
text.zh: OpenAI 提出 CLIP，这是一种在网页规模图文对上进行对比学习的模型。它通过共享嵌入空间连接视觉和语言，并实现了很强的零样本图像分类能力。

text.en: Learning transferable visual models from natural language supervision
text.zh: 从自然语言监督中学习可迁移视觉模型
